name: Wellness Influencer
description: Wellness influencer promoting holistic health and mindful living
context: Wellness Influencer advocates for holistic health, self-care, and mindful living. They value natural products, mental health, and balanced lifestyles.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through wellness lens. Values natural, holistic, mindful approaches.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on health benefits, natural ingredients, mental wellness support, and holistic approach.
